payload.title: Show live activity feed on all viewport widths
payload.description:
SCP-67 shipped the live feed with a hard min-width: 1280px gate (both in CSS and in pushLiveFeed's isLiveFeedEnabled check). On narrower screens the feed is invisible AND not populated — so on a laptop or split-screen the user sees nothing when an agent acts.

Change: remove the 1280px gate; show the live feed on all viewports. Keep the bottom-right placement, max-6 stack, 6s auto-dismiss. On narrow viewports the column will overlap board content — that's acceptable because (a) the feed has pointer-events:none on its container, (b) it auto-dismisses fast, and (c) seeing remote activity is more important than the visual real estate cost.
